site.title: ETTA Trading Corporation | Liberian Cocoa for Responsible Global Markets
site.description: ETTA Trading Corporation connects Liberian smallholder farmers to responsible regional and global cocoa buyers through direct sourcing, careful handling, and transparent trade.

hero.headline: Quality Liberian Cocoa, Built on Farmer Trust
hero.subheadline: ETTA Trading Corporation connects Liberian smallholder farmers to responsible regional and global cocoa buyers through direct sourcing, careful handling, and transparent trade.

about.headline: A purpose-driven cocoa trading company rooted in Liberia
about.content: ETTA Trading Corporation is a Liberian agro-based social enterprise established by young entrepreneurs with a shared vision: to transform Liberia's cocoa sector. We are not a middleman operation with no accountability. We are a direct trade company with farmer relationships at the center. Our focus is practical: empower farmers, cultivate quality, and connect Liberian cocoa to reliable regional and global markets that respect responsible sourcing.

values.title: Farmer Empowerment
values.description: We work directly with farming cooperatives, providing training, fair pricing, and market access.

values.title: Quality Assurance
values.description: Rigorous sorting, grading, and processing standards ensure every batch meets international export requirements.

values.title: Sustainable Practices
values.description: We promote agroforestry, organic methods, and environmental stewardship across our supply chain.

products.headline: Export-Grade Cocoa & Coffee
products.description: From the fertile soils of Liberia's rainforest belt, we source and trade premium agricultural commodities that meet the highest international standards.

items.name: Fermented Dry Cocoa Beans
items.description: Grade 1 fermented and sun-dried cocoa beans with optimal flavor profiles for chocolate manufacturing. Moisture content below 8%, fully fermented with zero mold.

items.name: Raw Cocoa Beans
items.description: High-quality raw cocoa beans for specialty chocolate makers and industrial processors seeking unique terroir flavors.

items.name: Arabica Coffee Beans
items.description: Premium washed Arabica coffee beans grown in Liberia's highland regions. Bright acidity with citrus and floral notes.

items.name: Robusta Coffee Beans
items.description: Bold, full-bodied Robusta coffee with high caffeine content, ideal for espresso blends and instant coffee production.

operations.headline: From Farm to Port with Precision
operations.description: Our integrated supply chain ensures quality at every step—from farmer training and collection to processing, storage, and export logistics.

steps.title: Farmer Partnership
steps.description: We establish long-term relationships with registered farming cooperatives, providing agricultural inputs and technical training.

steps.title: Collection & Sorting
steps.description: Produce is collected at regional buying centers where initial quality assessment, weighing, and fair pricing occur.

steps.title: Processing & Fermentation
steps.description: Cocoa undergoes controlled fermentation and sun-drying. Coffee is washed, pulped, and dried to precise moisture levels.

steps.title: Quality Control
steps.description: Every batch is tested for moisture, mold, foreign matter, and bean count to ensure export compliance.

steps.title: Storage & Export
steps.description: Processed commodities are stored in climate-controlled warehouses before containerization and shipment to international buyers.

sustainability.headline: Cultivating a Greener Future
sustainability.description: Environmental stewardship and community wellbeing are at the core of our business model. We believe sustainable agriculture is the only path forward.

initiatives.title: Agroforestry Programs
initiatives.description: We promote shade-grown cocoa and coffee intercropped with native trees, preserving biodiversity and carbon sequestration.

initiatives.title: Farmer Training
initiatives.description: Regular workshops on organic farming, post-harvest handling, and climate adaptation techniques.

initiatives.title: Women's Empowerment
initiatives.description: Over 40% of our partner farmers are women. We provide dedicated support, financing access, and leadership training.

initiatives.title: Zero Deforestation
initiatives.description: Strict policy against encroachment into protected forests. All sourcing from existing farmland only.

leadership.headline: Meet the Team Behind ETTA
leadership.description: Our leadership combines deep agricultural expertise with international business acumen, all rooted in Liberian soil.

ceo.name: Ernest M. Jacobs
ceo.title: Founder & Chief Executive Officer
ceo.bio: Ernest founded ETTA Trading Corporation with a vision to transform Liberia's agricultural sector. With over 10 years of experience in commodity trading and rural development, he has built ETTA into a trusted bridge between Liberian farmers and global markets. His leadership emphasizes ethical sourcing, farmer empowerment, and sustainable growth. Ernest leads ETTA's vision, trade strategy, institutional partnerships, and market direction.

team.name: Orocious Moifore
team.title: Operations Manager
team.bio: Coordinates field operations, sourcing activity, and day-to-day supply chain execution across all ETTA facilities.

team.name: Thompson K. Kpair
team.title: Quality Control Specialist
team.bio: Supports cocoa quality standards, product handling, inspection, and buyer-readiness across the supply chain.

team.name: Gboinzo K. Gblorso
team.title: Board Member
team.bio: Provides governance support, strategic guidance, and oversight for responsible growth and institutional development.

gallery.headline: Life at ETTA
gallery.description: A visual journey through our farms, facilities, team, and the communities we serve across Liberia.

contact.headline: Let's Build Something Together
contact.description: Whether you're a buyer seeking premium Liberian cocoa or coffee, or a farmer looking for a fair trading partner—we're here to connect.

info.address: Karnplay City, Nimba County, Republic of Liberia
